steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to emphasize a similarity between the two sculptures. The key signal is finding what both sculptures share in common, not their differences.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: C directly establishes their similarity through the parallel structure “is...as is,” which states that both are LED light sculptures made by Grimanesa Amoros. The other three contradict the goal by describing only one sculpture (A), emphasizing a size difference (B), or explicitly contrasting their materials (D). This matches choice C — C is correct.
